name: Minesweeper Extended
short_description: Classic, Hex, 3D or Endless! Want to play Minesweeper to pass the time? Play the classic original or try some new unique takes on it!
detailed_description:
Minesweeper offers you a gathered place to play the original classic take on Minesweeper, same rules, same style. Or try some completely different styles of the original! Play Hex mode, an entirely different grid style. Experience the game in a new perspective and play it in 3D mode. You can also challenge yourself in the Endless Mode where you play until you lose or reach the end with each game getting more diffucult than the previous!

Key Features:

  • Classic
  • Hexagonal
  • 3D
  • Endless
